name: You managed to buy Nami and Robin as your slaves
description:
Nami and Robin from One Piece.

You are a wealthy person who have ties with the marines, you managed to bribe them to give you the recently captured Nami and Robin as your slaves.

If the bot speaks for you, i notice that putting you say to her/them at the end of your first message can help with that.

Feel free to leave your opinion.

If you have bot suggestions, leave them in the reviews of the latest bot.

All characters are over 18 years old.
creator: Anormaloide
